fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routing number.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the routing reference number.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the operation number.

fields.name: Next Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next operation number.

fields.name: Previous Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the previous operation number.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of operation.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the operation.

fields.name: Setup Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the setup time of the operation.

fields.name: Run Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the run time of the operation.

fields.name: Wait Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the wait time after processing.

fields.name: Move Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the move time.

fields.name: Fixed Scrap Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fixed scrap quantity.

fields.name: Lot Size
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items that are included in the same operation at the same time. The run time on routing lines is reduced proportionally to the lot size. For example, if the lot size is two pieces, the run time will be reduced by half.

fields.name: Scrap Factor %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the scrap factor in percent.

fields.name: Setup Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the setup time of the operation.

fields.name: Run Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code that applies to the run time of the operation.

fields.name: Wait Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the wait time unit of measure.

fields.name: Move Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the move time unit of measure.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional description text.

fields.name: Concurrent Capacities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the concurrent capacity of the operation.

fields.name: Send-Ahead Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the send-ahead quantity of the operation.

fields.name: Routing Link Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a routing link code.

fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the standard task code that applies to the operation.

fields.name: Unit Cost per
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost for this operation if it is different than the unit cost on the work center or machine center card.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the routing line (operation).

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the routing line (operation).

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the routing line (operation).

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the routing line (operation).

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the production order to which the routing list belongs.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Routing Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the routing line, such as Planned, In Progress, or Finished.

fields.name: Flushing Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method to use to calculate and handle output at the work or machine center. Manual: Output must be posted manually by using the output journal. Forward: Output is automatically calculated and posted when you change the status of a simulated, planned (or firm planned) production order to Released. You can still post output manually from the output journal. Backward: Output is automatically calculated and posted when you change the status of a released production order to Finished. You can still post output manually from the output journal.

fields.name: Expected Operation Cost Amt.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of operations. It is automatically calculated from the capacity need, when a production order is refreshed or replanned.

fields.name: Expected Capacity Need
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected capacity need for the production order.

fields.name: Expected Capacity Ovhd. Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity overhead. It is automatically calculated from the capacity need, when a production order is refreshed or replanned.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".

fields.name: Schedule Manually
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the underlying capacity need is recalculated each time a change is made in the schedule of the routing.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the machine or work center on the production order routing line operates.

fields.name: Open Shop Floor Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the corresponding bin at the machine or work center, if the location code matches the setup of that machine or work center.

fields.name: To-Production Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin that holds components with a flushing method, that involves a warehouse activity to bring the items to the bin.

fields.name: From-Production Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the corresponding bin at the machine or work center if the location code matches the setup of that machine or work center.

fields.name: Posted Output Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total output quantity that has been posted to the capacity ledger. Value expressed in base unit of measure.

fields.name: Posted Scrap Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total scrap quantity that has been posted to the capacity ledger. Value expressed in base unit of measure.

fields.name: Posted Run Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total run time that has been posted to the capacity ledger.

fields.name: Posted Setup Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total set up time that has been posted to the capacity ledger.
